title: Zaid Workshop: Introduction to Shaders
description: In this workshop, we will cover the fundamentals of shaders, including how to write and implement them in your projects. By the end of the workshop, you will have a solid understanding of shaders and be able to create your own custom effects.
location: H962 Hall building, Sir George William Campus, 1455 Boul. de Maissoneuve O.

title: Procedural Generation with MGD President Zachary Shade
description: Learn how to generate dynamic environments using procedural techniques. Perfect if your into game dev, world-building, or want to make your scenes feel alive
location: Room H962, Hall Building 1455 Blvd. de Maisonneuve Ouest, Sir George William Campus

title: Game Nights
location: Visualization studio, Webster Library 3rd floor, Concordia SGW
description: Hosted by Concordia Game Dev Club and SCS Concordia, Game Night is an event where students can come together to play games, meet new people, and have fun! All are welcome to join us for an evening of fun and games!

title: Winter Game Jam 2026
description: Hosted by Concordia Game Dev Club, Winter Game Jam is a 48-hour event
